briefs.title: Three Social Services Employers Removed from BC's Public Sector Employers List
briefs.summary: BC updated its Social Services Employers Regulation by removing three organizations — 0793649 B.C. Ltd. (Summerland Community Support), Southern Okanagan Association for Integrated Community Living, and Southern Okanagan Community Inclusion Society — from the official list of public sector employers covered under the Public Sector Employers Act.
